name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-44
title: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py argparse uses add_help=False but provides no custom --help
description: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py parser is created with add_help=False (line 93). No custom -h or --help is added. Running 'dispatch-tdd-subagent.py --help' fails as unknown arg (exits with the script's stderr usage). Either set add_help=True for free --help, or add a custom help handler. Users running with --help expect usage, not error.
